use_cases: Display product or service features on a landing page
Highlight key benefits in a feature grid layout
Present service offerings with icons and descriptions
Showcase tool capabilities in a documentation page
Organize pricing tier features or included functionalities
ai_summary: A lightweight, reusable feature card component built with shadcn/ui patterns. Displays an icon, title, and description in a centered layout with a subtle hover lift animation. Uses semantic card styling with theme-adaptive colors and rounded corners, making it suitable for showcasing features across various industries and landing pages.
